title: HELPLINE - 211info
text: COMMUNITY WORKS HELPLINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a crisis hotline and referral services about domestic violence, sexual assault, sex trafficking, homeless/runaway youth, and stalking. 2594 E Barnett Road Suite C Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 779-4357 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 779-4357 Español (541) 779-2393 ext 209 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Location is in the RE/MAX building, in a complex on the corner of E Barnett Road and Black Oak Drive. Use the RE/MAX entrance and take stairs or elevator to the lower floor. Services: Domestic Violence Hotlines Human Trafficking Hotlines Sexual Assault Hotlines Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - JACKSON COUNTY CONTINUUM OF CARE SCREENINGS HOUSING/SHELTER - TRANSITIONAL LIVING PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - DOMESTIC VIOLENCE SURVIVOR ADVOCACY INFORMATION SERVICES - LABOR AND SEX TRAFFICKING SURVIVOR ADVOCACY INFORMATION SERVICES - SEXUAL ASSAULT SURVIVOR ADVOCACY If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. COMMUNITY WORKS
